star_1.text: I wouldve given this game 5 stars if it wasn't for this specific bug. Basically, the game often doesn't respond to input when trying to move the character, every. single. round. It's a borderline gameplay ruining bug that just ruins the fun, im not sure if bug fixes are still being implemented but please listen to feedback on this game, there's still people who want to enjoy and play this game without issues like these not being fixed!

I had about 70 pets on dash-tag and i love playing it every bit!! I just got back onto it to find out ALL my pets, money, and EVERYTHING is gone!! I have nothing but Sparky and I refuse to restart all over again!! I am just going to uninstall it. Tunnel Town has done the same thing to me where I lost ALL my progress and I'm extremely upset.

Honestly it's a very good game, a huge part of my childhood BUT the reason I put 1 star is because it is simply unplayable. Every few seconds, it glitches and leaps you forward, making you run into obstacles and fall off cliffs. I COULD continue playing with it and convince myself it's a cool little challenge but I just can't. It's extremely annoying and almost makes me snap my device in half. Now imagine a little kid having this issue? This is unacceptable, respectfully, please fix this issue.

I lost a few hours of gameplay to the cloud save, if you can, make it so it either asks for which data to load or to just prioritize local saves. Also, make it so it saves more frequently, i lost another good to the game just not saving what I've done. Stuff lost to data loss, 20 some emeralds, 8 pets, a few thousand coins Edit: it's even worse than i thought, lost another 20 some minutes of animal farming. Continuous edits are to show how much progress I've lost to unsaved data

The only reason this gets a one star is because of how badly progress saving is done. Last time my progress was saved when I got a new pet and that's it. Every single time from then on, no matter what I get or do, it won't get saved and my progress goes ALL THE WAY BACK to what it was before I started a new run. It's just terrible, I can't even collect pets without them getting erased the very next time I enter the game

When I was playing... It would not show up, I searched the dash tag app, and could NOT find it. I didn't want to reinstall it, cause it had all my progress... but I did it and I wanted to install it again, but I couldn't find the app??? A few months later (Now) I finally found it! But I don't want to install it, (Incase it happens again) sorry but I'm rating it a 1 star.

I would get rare pets, specifically Luna i think her name was, and then she would disappear the next day. Cloud backup didnt work, and when I would try to clear my storage, it STILL didn't work. Gem amounts would reset each day for some reason, and again, pets would disappear

This would be a five-star reveiw if I didn't have this problem. Every time I try to play the loading screen is up for like 5 minutes. After that it shows a connection lost. Which is odd because you don't even need internet to play this game. I always have to redownload the game just to get it to work. Which sucks, because you lose all your progess, I had almost all of the pets! I was really bummed when I had to redownload the game. I really do hope they fix this.

would gladly change my review, I used to play this a lot when I was younger. now it's full of glitches and bugs that make it unplayable. when I emailed devs to let them know they gave no help. this really needs a patch...

Since the new updated its glitches when i run to the train it keeps makin me crash at nothing and i wasted my hard earn gems on tomatoes and it sucks knowing i saved my wasted 25 gems...i was trying to reset or installs... And misha keeps getting me even tho i dont bump at anything plz fix! I loved Animaljam alot even the apps aswell! Also i cant login into facebook :/

I Love Ajpw Im A Member On It But This Game Just.... Not Great At All The Controlls Are Very Hard No Matter What You Do Like Play Rought, Soft, Or Both. And Everytime I Get SOOOO Close To a Pet It Freezes And Next Thing I Know... Is That Im Dead Also Its Very Hard I Have Been Play on This Game For An Hour Straight And Have No Pets. Also The Cayon Place Is Super Hard And Stressfull So Many Things Are On The Screen Moving Around And The Trains You Jump On Are Hard To Get To One Of The Other. -_-

You literally can't play more than one game without getting hit up for more money to play a second game - this is not a good way to teach my kid about computer games, immediate delete - this drip-drip payment model SUCKS, I would have happily paid £10 to buy this game

It was fun at first then things changed quickly.. for example if you wanted to jump and swipe right it'd just JUMP! I would rate this a better rating but no, it just kept on crashing and stuff no matter WHAT I do it never stops! Fix. This. Please.

I'm sorry but for some reason it wont let me play it fully, it allways stays stuck on the age thing or the loading screen, I've tried clearing cache and deleting to get it again but it stays the same. I litterly can not play it.👁👄👁

ok to start things off why did I think this would run smoothly as a conventional game!!! I start off and a dog runs away from a panda (ok???) and then I think to myself "why are all these pets running away?" I have the heart to tell y'all that this panda is NO DOUBT Abusive. this was a pain paradise mixed with a glitchy mess that was subway surfers but just for kids. wow. how is this game still on the playstore!?! I absolutely am in awe of how this game can even be qualified as good. no honey.
THIS GAME IS UNPLAYABLE!!!!! 🤬 I CANT EVEN MAKE IT PAST 1000 DISTANCE when I jump over an obstacle, It pushes me forward in less than a second, making me crash in the obstacle, killing me.

My little girl was enjoying the game. Linking to facebook to get the extra coins wiped all progress she had made. The customer service team pretty much said "on the bright side you get to catch all the pets again".

So a while back ago i bought like half the pets got alot of rare ones and stuff. and then i get a new phone and ALL of my progress is GONE! Edit: They didnt help me and refused to give me a refund. Terrible App. Trying to get everything back now. smh.

NO SAVING!!! so i got a new tablet since my old one broke and i made it so i could get every thing back but since this had NO SAVING it made me restart and got rid of 3 years worth of rare and ultra rare pets,cars,skins and lures! so if you have a kid that wants you to download this game and its on a tablet ect. and you think they might brake it, DONT GET THIS APP THEN!!!!!!!

Why is this app no longer available for install. I can't find an explanation anywhere. Please put this back as normal so it can be installed again or put up an explanation as to why it is not available. You will get more stars if I can download.

star_2.text: I lwnjoy the game itself, very nice and very effective on keeping people busy... However, no new pets have been added in forever. That to me is the best part of the game and not ever having the satisfaction of having more pets to experience sucks and to me it ruins the game. But if you like lack of updates, running through the same scenery over and over, with no new collectable items then this is the game for you

Good fun, BUT can you please update and offer a way for me to save my progress and purchases. Everytime I reinstall or install on a device, it is like a new account. I loose all the animals and vehicles. I have to repurchase everything. Your help/support claims it is based on the age you input at start of game. If true, how was I able to purchase the gems, coins, and vehicles? Your app is not allowing a 8 year old to make purchases? Because I made purchases with my kids'ages on several devices.

I used to play this game back when I was a bit younger. It seems that I can not back my data up by signing into Facebook. It just keeps saying that the app is in development. It's really a shame you guys stopped updating this game. In my personal opinion, I would have thought it had a lot of potential. You could have also added so much more and make it twice as much fun and improve the game more and more if you guys still continued it. Personally, this game is far better than tag with Ryan.

I love this app a lot. There are a lot of animals to collect and play with. But the app is no longer up for install. I had to scroll through my library to find it. This game should be superior to Tag w/ Ryan! Was made before it! Also, the Facebook login doesn't work? Shows me a message that says that the user has blocked you from seeing? Does that have to do with anything with the login? I know the game is old but people like me still like it. Can you continue the project?

Fun game! Where are the super epics? I've tagged around 150 pets, not a single super epic. I don't know if this is a glitch, or just bad luck on my end. The last time I played this game (I reinstalled it), I would get a super epic every 15 pets-ish. Also, on the wiki it says the chance to get a super epic is a 10% chance. This just makes the game feel super unrewarding

I used to play this game all the time when I was a kid but now it is a glitchy and laggy game that is known to cause people to lose progress. Also during my own experience recently as I was playing it keeps lagging and would cause me to crash into things constantly because it went forward in time suddenly one second I was fine the next second I missed. This game needs some serious updates before it will be fun to play again.

This game is great. As long as you aren't on a chrome book. It does this glitch where I cant see some parts of the game like coins, x's, etc. If you could fix this that'd be great! After all, it's a GREAT game. Also sugar gliders would make the game a lot better. Thanks for reading.

Dash tag was a really good game.. up until the recent update. Mainly adding the pet finders. You can't even get them from chests or while in a run. You have to buy them for gems, 5 of them for 100 gems. It's annoying to waste 100 gems on these pet finders only to get duplicates and no super rares. What happened to the lures? Well, after playing over 50 runs with lures I never even got one super rare, either I'm very unlucky or you can't get SR animals anymore from lures. What was the point?..

I love this game as well all the controls are great and all but as it turns out when i got back on dash tag i have to wait again for it to load on the main menu screen after installing this game since when i have tried it yesterday it have worked but when i started going on dash tag the next morning then it takes a while for me to wait a few hours or so and if you can fix that ill be more happy to give it a five stars also is there a way to link the dash tag into ajpw then that be way more fun☺

I used to love this game. Even put money into getting the different vehicles. But I just went in and found that my whole game has reset! all my animals gone, vehicles, outfits. back to square one. So disappointed.

I'm not sure why this game isn't up for install anymore, it's a great game! I had to scroll through my history just to find this game again, and even though I found it, I can't even play! It just tells me that I have internet connection issues (I dont) and it's super annoying.

When I first installed it, I couldn't stay off the game! It was so addictive. But recently I haven't been able to play it due to a problem. When I click on the app it opens but I'm staring and the same picture and the game doesn't load. Please fix this!!!!

I had almost every single pet in the game. But then one day when I got on my WHOLE game restarted and deleted ALL the progress I had done. I was very upset with this but overall it's a cool app, no lags, no bugs, and no glitches other than my progress.

I love the game the animals are so cute buttttttttt it kinda sucks cause I was on vacation and when it came back I went on my phone and it restarted everything I mean I had 179 emeralds and now they are gone and all my pets are gone and my coins and my record is back to 0 I'm sorry but this game makes me mad Change that please and maybe I will play it again.......................................... Thank you a lot if you can change that and also get a life people that made this game

so let me explain this as clear as possible. Well, a momma bear chases her kids after they escape and run away from her, then, they run through hazerdous terrain, and get hit several times.. now does that sound like a kid game? no, not really. although, it does have very good graphics, so 2 stars.

It's a great game but I've been playing it every day for at least 6 months now and I can't get even one super rare pet. Surely it's not right? It's becoming very repetitive without the excitement of catching one. How long before it happens??

It's exiting the game and killing me for no reason, and if you lag you're dead. There's nothing you can do if it's lag you can just try to press pause but most of the time the game kills you before you get the chance. I would've uninstalled this game already if it weren't so cute.

I dearly love the game! just now I open it up and it's on the loading page forever! it doesn't need to be updated, And I'm afraid to delete it and reinstall it to find out EVERYTHINGS gone! I ended up deleting it and I lost everything.
Such a fun game but the recent glitches and bugs make it hard to play. The character will glitch and run into an obstacle.

You know this game is awesome and has so many animals. But the thing is I had MIDNIGHT and I loved this character then I didn't play for a while I come back what did I get?! I LOST ALL OF MY PETS my friends have this problem and also maybe others. SUCH A SCAM!

star_3.text: Ive played this game in the past and loved it but I went to download it and play it and as Im playing it's like it's skipping. I don't know how to describe it but when you're approaching an obstacle and you have gotten to the correct distance to jump or slide under it, it skips you forward and you hit the obstacle. But it only does it every few jumps. It's weird. I hope that can get fixed.

This game is super cute and fun, but there are 2 major glitches that are ruining it for me. When i first launched the game and it was teaching me how to tag a pet, if i switched lanes right before it tells me to tap on it the game will permanently freeze and say "make sure you are in the same lane as the pet"..... i had to close the game several times. Another glitch i've encountered is when playing offline/with a bad connection, it did not SAVE any of the pets i caught or my new high score.

Having played Animal Jam in the past, I was excited to try out this mobile game, and was delightfully surprised to realise that it is better than many other endless runner games, especially since players are not bombarded with any sort of quests or events aside from the main game. The pets are adorable and fun to collect. However, the pure number of times that I have run into lag, glitches, and even an inability to open the game (this rarely ever occurs to me!) heavily brings down my rating.

Game needs wifi now to save data when it didnt before. Its simple- save the data to the device and then back it up to a cloud drive when wifi is re-enabled. If you can't save progress, well thats just angering. You were able to before the update. And what in the world do you mean i can afford a cop car before i can afford 5 cat finders??? I used to be able to all the time with milk cartons when lures had acted as finders in the game. Now theyre too pricy.

the game disappeared from my tablet, this game is great and all, but the mama bear chasing there pets or whatever to a something like a rainforest, coral canyons, Ice, and something else and they get Slap into many Blocks and stuff. but this is a really good game. I sadly lost this game somehow but it's still great! keep it up!😊

It's cute but the lag on this game is terrible. I don't have too much space being used up and i'm playing offline but more than once will it kick me out or lag. I'll swipe and my character will keep running straight. Also the train glitch. I'll be running and a moving train with a ramp will run me over. Just saying please please please try to resolve these issues.

I couldn't figure out why my seven year old raged so hard at this game. I thought she was being a typical kid and was generally upset about losing. I tried the game for myself and found out that she was complaining because of fluidity issues. Every once in a while the game will glitch because of moving obstacles or environment changes, causing you to crash into something because of processing delay. Otherwise, it's a cute game but she's on hiatus from it because it's been making her mad lol.

A very fun and addicting game but I do have a problem with it since A few months ago, every time I try to open the app it doesn't load after the tiger being chased by the panda pic at the start of the game... Does anyone know how to fix it? it's kinda like the game crashed forever I don't wanna redo all of my progress since I'm so close to getting all the pets.

This game is OK. It loads quickly. The animals are awesome (super cute, keep it up). Graphics are great. BUT. With the treats to attract animals. You can only use it on one run. And what I'm really irritated about is the fact it's so much money 💰. And then u die. And loose it. I spent 1500 on it and for a 10sec run I lost it. On the other hand it's great.

I'm so happy this game has returned! It's fun and very silly! Though a small issue I am experiencing is that sometimes it'll randomly jump my character up a bit, which messes up my run. Even though this makes the game annoying and unplayable at times, the nostalgia makes it incredibly worth it!

Fun at first... Okay! speaking as a person who's played AJPW and Dash tag, both games are fun! But i have had *all* the pets for a while and i haven't seen any new ones. This game has *alot* of potential to be a extremely popular game, but I think you need to add more pets, more areas when you run, customization abilities for your pets, like you can get bows and stuff to put on your pets, you should have a room in the house where you can see *all* the pets running around. Please update Dashtag!
The game is really fun and I love it but when I exit out the whole game resets and my progress is fully gone, if you could fix this problem I would really like it more but it is a very fun game.

I have some problems with this game. 1: I think it is just me but after i got all the rares i still had commons left to collect. 2: Why does it seem like when you max out a common it barely allows other pets to appear? 3: The falling pillars. no need to explain. the Desert is a little difficult. and last but not least 4: Why have the 3 key chest? it is a waste of keys to use. Anyways this game is okay. not the best game in the wolrd but isnt the worst either.

I like everything about it! It's like animal jam cuz it's made by the same developer, and I was wondering if we get something from here and you get it in animal jam play wild? If not plz can you do so! and also its not letting me log into facebook so i cant save my data, if you could just fix it i would really appreciate it!

i used to play this game a lot, and bought upgrades but after reinstalling the game ive had no progress saved. logging in via facebook also displays an error. i spent so long playing this game and paid my money for car upgrades and more so it's really upsetting to see it all gone, please help

This is a really cute dash games with similar Animal Jam pets. Btw, before you install, there hasn't been an update for 2 years! Nothing new, no challenges, and can't decorate your pets. Just running, getting pets, and collect coins. That's all.

This game is quite f u n, BUT. I wasted my emeralds for basically NOTHING. I spent them for a revive then i started to go. Then a minute later i crashed into a wall of those x signs. All of the lanes had them! It was very annoying. Please fix this or somthing like that. ♡♡ Thanks!

The game is amazing! My only complaint is that the only 3 lands get boring. I wish i could run around the temple of zios, crystal sands, or maybe even the latest land in animal jam, baloosh. Other than that the characters are interesting and the gameplay is amazing

I think this game is okay, But once I started to stop opening the game ( Playing it ) And when I tried getting into the game, All I saw was the home screen. The tiger, Panda, And the path. I couldn't get to the game. Also, It doesn't let you keep the prop if you lose. (Without getting the pet) The users paid for it which is alot of coins/Emeralds. I am not really satisfied. Please fix this game.

I like the gameplay, the pets I like everything except the graphics! When I use lures to catch the other pets it suddenly stopped and I lose the game just like that! Please fix the bug that keep causing me that or I'll go nuts and bolts!

star_4.text: Excellent and fast runner game! The creatures are absolutely adorable and I especially love the rainbow snake Toby. The controls are very nice but The. Music is not great and every time you get a coin, you also get a beep sound. Also, be weary, when you click on an add to continue your run, the game crashes. Otherwise I think it is a great game that you should try.

Dash Tag is a really fun game. Collecting the animals is really fun, and an update with some new ones would be awesome. The only reason I'm giving a 4 is because of a glitch I have been having. When I look at all my pets, names are mixed up and different animals are in those spots, but if I click on the animal the correct one will appear, kinda confusing. Other than that its a great game.

Dashtag is one of the very few Endless runner games that I acually like, Giving those who play a fun time with various things to choose from to do. However, Dashtag has started to develop problems such as, Intense lag, Invisible walls, and randomly hitting things that aren't there. It would be highly appreciated if these problems would be fixed so, I can enjoy the game without any issues to worry about. Thank you.

I love Dash Tag, and it's a shame it was forgotten about. I find that collecting pets along the way makes the endless runner aspect way more fun. Although it gets repetitive after a while since there isn't new stuff being added anymore, I still find it fun. I give it four stars because there's a glitch that causes the images of my pets to get mixed up, making it confusing to scroll through to see what pets I have. In addition, you cannot log in through Facebook to save your progress.

This game is extremely fun and addicting! It's easy to play and pets are super cute. While I love to play it, it's the battery and storage problem that I'm not fond of. Even with "power save mode" on, I'm still finding that my phone is losing battery charge very fast when I play it. Also, it's a very large app for the game it offers. I adored the game and would like to play it more often if this problem gets fixed!

Hello Wildworks! Please read this! I have recently downloaded the game on my Chromebook, which is the only android I own that has the Play Store on it. It would be easier for me if I could get it on my Kindle Fire. Please make Dash Tap avalible to the amazon app store as soon as possible! I would rate 5 stars on there, otherwise my review is a 4 stars. In otherwords, the game is great! It isn't as challenging for me since I already play many games that are like this. Since it's more challenging on the chromebook, I'm still stuck on the first pet you have at the start. As I said before, please make the app avalible for the amazon app store soon! Thank you!

I really like the game, I just have 2 problems with it. First, I uninstalled this game due to storage and I had almost every pet even Super Rares ones, I wanted to download it again and I lost all everything! It would make alot of people happy if you add a way to save stuff after uninstalling. Second, sometimes while in a run I try and walk up a train that you are supposed to walk up but then I walked threw it and get caught. Please fix these problems, Thank you so much! :)

❗BUG❗ The game brings nostalgia when I played this game back then, I have a moto g stylus, and when I downloaded the game I noticed there's a slight glitch/bug issue, whenever I play it starts to glitch/get bugged by every 5-10 seconds. Everytime I try to pass a obstacle it glitches me and hit it making me instantly fail. If there's any chance please fix the glitch/bugs in the game + add more pets if that's okay. This game gives me so many memories I love it!

I am ADDICTED TO THIS GAME! One morning, I literally spent three hours playing this game. The animals/pets are really cute, but maybe you could add more of them? Like a penguin or something. I just wish there was some easier way to get emeralds than buying them. I just think it's a waste of money and time. Anyway, this game is AWESOME and I can NEVER stop playing it!

Very fun endless runner game! All the pets are cute and the cosmetic options for the Panda chasing you are fun. Each pet you play as has 3 different abilities you can upgrade, which makes it unique to play with every different pet. My only problem is that there's no information in-game for each ability. For some abilities it's obvious what they do (at least, they are to me) while for others I can't work out what they're meant to be doing. I'd like info for each ability to be accessed by tap it.

Dash tag is very fun and something i really like about it is that it doesnt have any ads. I would recommend maybe you could do a first person setting it would make the game so much cooler! Keep up the great work WildWorks! I would give this 5 stars but there is one little thing..... The wifi. This would be a great game to play if you were bored anywhere... Especially on a long car/bus/train/whatever vehicle ride. But you need wifi and thats the problem maybe IF POSSIBLE could you change that? :)

Quite nice and fun, although there are quite a lot of glitches. Once the pet I was chasing having the ability to go through things that are impossible to go through! Once, when I was on the verge of catching a super rare animal, the game suddenly glitched, so that everything slowed down and I couldn't move my animal anymore

The game and everything is so cute!! ^_^ The problem is I wish that if you got a Double Jump Boost, the screen would move up with you and that it you accidentally bump into something, the Panda (The one chasing after you) kinda gets in your way, so it's kinda hard to see and I'm worried I'll crash. But besides that, you should get the game 'cause its really fun and you'll enjoy it ^_^

I love this game! WildWorks do really good job on making their games, even the design of the game itself is satisfying! Although, there is happening some visual bugs while playing, it's look like the character model is glitching and stretching sometimes and taking part of the screen, and it flashes very fast. This can be very harmful for people who have epilepsy and even mess with the game experience. With that being said, the game is good, but still need some bug fixes!

It's addictive and fun. I enjoyed it so much. There's just one issue, when running along a train somethimes it manages to get you inside the train, ending you run. This wasn't too much of an issue until I was chasing a super rare and did not nave enough gems to revive myself. Other than that it's a perfect game, the animals are ADORABLE!!

Pretty good game; you don't need to spend money on anything aside from currency and keys but even then you get those really easily from runs. It's a bit annoying getting all the pets (especially since after a bit the majority end up being pets you already have) so it would be nice if there was some sort of pity system or to not be able to get a certain pet if they're already fully upgraded. Also you can't play with wifi off (there's no multiplayer or ads, it's only for purchases).

Its cute!! its like subway surfers I have an addiction on it! I love it! But try to be a little different to subway surfers add more stuff in it! Like more pets! Elephants or like? I don't know! Just add more!! So it cant just be something similar do something that doesn't bore us do something NEW! then ill add 5 stars, Love the game Wild Works!

I love this game! Its quite addictive to be honest and so cute/Fun. but I have some suggestions.. and Notes When I'm going after pets they tend to bug out and glitch on the trains or stuff the player cant get to I kinda laugh tbh. anyways I think the Game Should have more story Like why is the pet running!? Is the panda bad er something? Anywho.. the pets you chase after should do something other than running, like stealing The coins or something and maybe More Places, Could we dress up the pets?

SO GLAD YOU ADDED THIS GAME BACK!! But please fix the glitch with the lures and attractions, they continue to stay even when the lure works. It doesn't disappear from my screen. And please add more pets to collect!! Maybe make like 500-1000 pets? It would be much more time consuming! Also please add a day and night time method, it would be so cool to see it turning day and night throughout running in the game! And please also add more areas to run through! Like Crystal sands, jamaa township!!

VERY occupying! I could play this game for hours! Just a couple things: 1. It has this AWFUL glitch where your character stays in the same spot even when you swipe like CRA-ZY!!!!!!!! Then it says you lost. 2. There REALLY should be more animal types. (PS It might be helpful to know I'm 9,but still, PLEASE, PLEASE try to fix these! Thanks!

star_5.text: The pets are adorable! I also love how new pets have come since it's release(Even though they were all super rare)but I do have some suggestions: Could you add a new species of pet? It seems boring to only have the ones we got, and when you add more can they be common instead of Super rare? Those are my suggestions but an amazing game nontheless.

I'm so happy you guys added this back to the plastered. I loved this game so much I went out of my way to install an apk of it before. No ads too which is fantastic. Bought the starter bundle to show my support. Looking forward to more content and updates! You guys should add colors, animal models, and patterns as unlockables/in app purchases so we can make and customize our own animal dasher with unique traits. I feel like that would be a hit with fans who played the original game.

Dash tag is very fun. The animals are super cute! It is similar to those other running games, but it's different because you collect cute pets along the way. You can get common, rare, and super rare! I'll tell you one of the super rare cats is REALLY cool and cute! I have 6 super rare so far. The farther you go, the faster it gets. You can be any of the pets that you get, and you WILL duplicates. I highly recommend this game for people who like Animal Jam, infinite running games, animals too!🐶

Very fun game, I really love this game, I love how you can find animals that look so cool! I was wondering if you could add something in the game, where you could play tag with the animals and even pick ten of them or let it pick itself, you can dash away if had to and tag other pets before the timer runs out, and when you tag a pet they will be it and tag others before timer runs out. Just by thinking of it, it will make it fun for others!

O.M.G!!! I am so happy this game is back it has been 6 years since I played! I love this game so much! The graphics are good, the game isn't pay-to-win, and the pets look super cool! I can't write everything but you guys should play RIGHT NOW!! It is so fun oml! Btw there are some bugs, Ex: Pets falling and still surviving, pets having a seizure?? (shaking ALOT), and obstacles hitting you before you reach them. but besides that, this game is awesome and you should definitely play!

This game is really fun, and time consuming, but I did play this game in a car journey without wifi I think?.. I saw a comment on that problem, maybe it has been fixed. The animals are cute, the descriptions are funny, the only thing is, its a bit disappointing when you catch the same animal, but the "journey" to catch him/her was fun, i guess! Overall, great game!! 😁😉

Even if this game is similar to subways surfers etc, it's still fun/cute and has some individuality, the designs are all adorable and pleasing. The game play is simple but nice, a little repetitive, but there aren't any ads. Would like a few more updates but overall a cute, fun simple game. Keep up the good work :)

Definitely recommend this for any animal jam or mobile game fan! I've been playing this game for years (since it first released) and I still adore it to this day! It's a fun pass time, especially for road trips. The endless part of it is also a perk, as you can go on forever in the rounds with no limit to the pets you can catch!

very fun and nostalgic! controls are easy to remember and I like how you can buy (with in game currency) these new trackers which help you find different types of pets. one cool idea I had was maybe to stop spawning a pet once you've maxed out their upgrades! IDK if it would work well in the game but it would make rares and super rares a little easier to find.

This is a very fun game that I can play when I'm bored! A good update to make (if you can) add new pets or species! Some ideas if you can ever add is: ducks, mice, elephants, and insects, maybe others, but that would be a good update if you ever can make them in your free time!

i love this game! it is so amazing! as soon as my cousins introduced me to it i fell in love with it! i kept asking them if i play it at their house, too, i still do.... it would make so much more fun if in the next update that you added more bioms/worlds and if every pet had its own unique abilty/power up and if you added a pet maker station!!!! it has an amazing screen play and it is a real time killer!!

Its a fun, cute little endless runner where the player plays as a small pet that looks like a pet from Animal Jam Play Wild. You can collect more pets by tagging them, hence the name being "Dash tag". Overall, a very stunning and wonderful game! I'd recommend it to any young kid as I have recommended the app to my friends. :)

I love this game! I love how their are so Manny different animals to chose from and I play this game when I am feeling down, have nothing to do or just any time. The game is a great time killer and has great graphics. You don't have to pay for much just things that you want if you don't have a lot of coins with are easy to get. Just a wonderful game, one of the best I've played

This game was quite successful in my opinion. It was nice and simple yet fun. I think you should return to it and add new areas, pets and more to keep it fresh and interesting! I really loved this game so it was sad to see it leave the store. I hope Tag With Ryan can become its own unique game instead of a replacement but I totally understand as you may have done a deal to sell Dash Tag to Ryan. You should definitely continue to make creative, educational games!

I love the game because the characters are absolutely stunning! But, this game has a funny looking glitch in it. I was playing as Gertrude, right? And when I played as her, I somehow tagged the character I was playing as, which is Gertrude. Is there a way that you can fix this bug? But then again, Dash Tag is a super fun game to play!! 👍

Dash Tag is a fun game where u play as an animal and catch ur other little animal friends as u run! It's similar to subway surf exsept u play as animals rather then human, one thing that I would suggest is could u please add birds? With maybe seed lure or somthing? I can just imagine a penguin running along the path with its little flippers back! Lol. I hope u add it and one more thing, I think buying the gem animal lures are a bit expensive 100 gems for a few lures is pretty expensive. Thx!

this game is very good, but the mini magnet that some pets have isn't really working? I tried upgrading it to 3 of range in one of my pets, but it doesn't really do anything. If that bug gets fixed, then this game would be better (if this is not a bug, then the mini magnet is useless)

This is an amazing game! A lot like Subway Surfers! You know what would make it even more awesome? If you could log into your AJPW account and play as your pets! That would be really cool. I also wish you could make an account for this, because I had almost ALL the pets, including all the s.rare pets, then I restarted my device (completely), I lost all my pets:(

Really fun game! Nice design, it's just that I keep getting the same pets over and over. Is that an error? Because I have a lot of pets, almost all of them, and I could have gotten all of them if I didn't get the same ones. Please fix this Wildworks

I love this game it is very good I like how overtime the round gets faster I also like how they added cars that can be used as a shield for one time it can also be as making you more fast at the start I also like how they added a coin cost for a car instead of all emeralds I like that you can find really good animals they are super cute (foxes turtles dogs Bunny's frogs cats and more?) I also like how they added lures for a specific animal you may want there are NO ADS in this game love the gam
